metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5293
metadata.comment:
Rationale: vesicle-associated membrane protein-associated protein B (VAPB) is a known ER protein (PMID:26899735).

Figure 1: SIM super-resolution microscopy of cultured rat hippocampal neurons showed VAPB localized to the postsynaptic compartment (identified by immunostaining for dendrites with MAP2 and PSD95/DLG4).

Figure 1e: VAPB and PTPIP51 are present in synaptoneurosome biochemical fractions prepared from rat brain.. Experimental description: M&M: "Hippocampal neurons were obtained from embryonic day 18 rat embryos and cultured in Neurobasal medium ..."

antibody:
"Rabbit and rat antibodies to VAPB and PTPIP51 were as described [9]. PMID:22131369
Rabbit anti-PTPIP51 and chicken anti-MAP 2 were from Gentex."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
